name: Mire Relics and Sinkholes
description: A D&D-leaning mire loot table for swamp ruins, cult caches, hag refuse, drowned graves, and Blood Weave-tainted relics.

entries.label: Blackreed Coin Pouch
entries.notes: Mud-stained coins wrapped in waxed reedcloth.

item.name: Bog-Iron Scraps
item.notes: Useful for repairs, crude weapons, or ritual anchors.

item.name: Witch-Reed Incense
item.notes: Burning it masks scent and gives a foul ceremonial haze.

item.name: Mireglass Shard
item.notes: A green-black glass splinter. Shows faint movement in nearby water.

item.name: Rotblossom Poultice
item.notes: A swamp medicine. Grants advantage on one check to treat poison or disease, at GM discretion.

reward.title: Cultist Bone Token
reward.body: A carved charm of Armok. It may grant a social opening with mire cultists or mark the bearer as suspicious elsewhere.

reward.title: Waterlogged Map Fragment
reward.body: Shows a partial route through sinkholes and old grave-roads. Useful as a clue handout.

entries.label: Swamp Pearls
entries.notes: Small black pearls taken from diseased mollusks.

item.name: Leech Jar
item.notes: Can be used for grim medicine, intimidation, or a disgusting distraction.

item.name: Smiling One Tooth
item.notes: A disturbing token. Whispers when soaked in blood.

item.name: Grave-Moss Candle
item.notes: When lit, undead footprints within 30 feet faintly glow for one minute.

item.name: Froghemoth Slime Flask
item.notes: Thrown flask creates a small slick patch. GM adjudicates save/terrain effect.

reward.title: Mirelord Prayer Strip
reward.body: A strip of bark bearing a prayer to death and renewal. Can point toward Mirelord lore or cult negotiation.

item.name: Ring of Marsh-Breath
item.notes: While worn, the bearer can hold breath twice as long and has advantage on checks against swamp fumes.

powers.label: Marsh-Lung Focus
powers.description: Steady breath against fumes, drowning, or swamp gases.

action.label: Marsh-Lung Focus
action.notes: Use the ring to steady breath against fumes, drowning, or swamp gases.

item.name: Quiver of Phasebolts
item.notes: Contains 3 spectral bolts that ignore half cover and briefly flicker through wood or reeds.

powers.label: Fire Phasebolt
powers.description: Fire a spectral bolt that ignores half cover.

action.label: Fire Phasebolt
action.notes: Ignores half cover; on hit, roll normal weapon damage plus GM-approved phase effect.

item.name: Veinsteel Scimitar of Regret
item.notes: +1 scimitar. Once per long rest, after hitting, force target to make a Wisdom save or be unable to take reactions until its next turn.

powers.label: Regret Cut
powers.description: Strike with the scimitar's memory-biting edge.

action.label: Regret Cut
action.notes: On hit, target makes WIS save against your item DC or loses reactions until next turn.

item.name: Amulet of the Mirelord
item.notes: Grants resistance to poison/necrotic themes at GM discretion and carries a creeping corruption hook.

powers.label: Mirelord's Tremor
powers.description: Sense movement through mud, water, and roots for one scene.

action.label: Mirelord's Tremor
action.notes: Once per long rest, gain tremorsense-like awareness through mud, water, and roots for one scene.

item.name: Dreambound Grimoire
item.notes: A spellbook that can answer one question during a long rest through a nightmare vision, but demands a memory in return.

powers.label: Nightmare Inquiry
powers.description: Ask one question and receive a symbolic dream answer.

action.label: Nightmare Inquiry
action.notes: Ask one question during a long rest. Receive a symbolic dream answer. The book claims one memory.

item.name: Shield of the Sinking Grave
item.notes: +1 shield. Once per long rest, create 15 feet of difficult terrain as grasping marsh-hands rise.

action.label: Grasping Grave
action.notes: Once per long rest, create a 15-foot area of grasping marsh-hands as difficult terrain.

entries.label: Heart-Silt Relic

condition.name: Marked by Heart-Silt
condition.description: The Mire notices the bearer. Once before the next dawn, the GM may offer advantage on a death, decay, swamp, or renewal-related roll at a narrative cost.

entries.notes: Capstone result added because 13 common + 3 uncommon + 3 rare = 19.
